html:
CalmWarnWaxingSteadyWaningDawnNo magic

“While in the Cave, it reveals the state of dark magic saturation.”

-

The Thulecite Medallion is an Ancient Pseudoscience Filter item. It requires 2 Nightmare Fuel, 2 Thulecite, and a Broken Pseudoscience Station to craft. Like all items from the station, the Thulecite Medallion cannot be prototyped and Characters need to be near a Broken Ancient Pseudoscience Station to craft it again.

The medallion changes colors to gauge the state of the Nightmare Cycle in the Ruins.

  • Calm Phase - The medallion will be tan.
  • Warning Phase - The medallion will be tan with red accents.
  • Nightmare Phase - The medallion will glow red. Nightmare Lights will spawn Shadow Creatures in this phase.
All stages of a Thulecite Medallion.

Examining the item at this time will provide further details regarding the current state of magical flux: becoming more magical, staying steady, or becoming less magical, referring to the start, middle, and end of the Nightmare Phase, respectively.

Thulecite Medallions can spawn at Cave Holes which can be gathered using The Lazy Forager.

When a Thulecite Medallion is in the inventory of a player, the Ancient Key will appear on their map, even if it is carried by another Mob or player, in a container or in an unexplored area. If the Ancient Guardian has not been killed, it will show its location, making it easier for players to locate the Ancient Guardian.

Usage

DSTDSRoGSWHam

“All is well.”
–Wilson
“Looks normal to me.”
–Willow
“No bad light.”
–Wolfgang
“I know not what lurks in the shadow.”
–Wendy
“AT CYCLE MINIMUM”
–WX-78
“The levels of ectoplasmic residue seem to be at their lowest.”
–Wickerbottom
“I think it's off.”
–Woodie
“The heart of the city is still.”
–Maxwell
“Nöthing stirs.”
–Wigfrid
“Everything's dandy.”
–Webber
“It appears that all is well.”
–Warly
“Quiet now”
–Wormwood
“Nothing out of place here.”
–Winona
“No games to play today.”
–Wortox
“It seem safe.”
–Wurt
“Nothing's really happening.”
–Walter
“Things seem quiet for the time being.”
–Wanda
“Getting pretty magical around here.”
–Wilson
“It's warning me.”
–Willow
“The bad light comes soon.”
–Wolfgang
“I can feel the prying eyes.”
–Wendy
“CYCLE MINIMUM HAS PASSED”
–WX-78
“There are low, but increasing levels of vapors containing ectoplasmic residue.”
–Wickerbottom
“This thing just turned on!”
–Woodie
“It beats once again.”
–Maxwell
“It's starting...”
–Wigfrid
“Something's brewing.”
–Webber
“I feel some magic coming on!”
–Warly
“Something happening...”
–Wormwood
“I feel uneasy for some reason.”
–Winona
“I'm getting so excited!”
–Wortox
“Getting weird, florp...”
–Wurt
“Things are starting to get exciting!”
–Walter
“Oh no no no, don't you dare!”
–Wanda
“It's becoming more concentrated!”
–Wilson
“The fuel is coming to life!”
–Willow
“The bad light is here and getting stronger.”
–Wolfgang
“They approach.”
–Wendy
“INCREMENTAL INCREASE DETECTED”
–WX-78
“Levels of ectoplasmic residue seem to be increasing.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's vibrating!”
–Woodie
“The pulse is quickening.”
–Maxwell
“The magic is heightening!”
–Wigfrid
“It's getting magickier!”
–Webber
“Magic hour!”
–Warly
“Getting scary”
–Wormwood
“The air's all prickly.”
–Winona
“Ooo, it's picking up!”
–Wortox
“Something happening!”
–Wurt
“I think the monsters are coming!”
–Walter
“They're everywhere! I-I need to get out of here!!”
–Wanda
“It seems to be staying steady.”
–Wilson
“It's almost humming.”
–Willow
“I think bad light not get stronger.”
–Wolfgang
“They're all around!”
–Wendy
“LEVELS ARE HIGH AND MONOTONIC”
–WX-78
“The levels of ectoplasmic residue seem to be at their peak.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's going crazy!”
–Woodie
“The pulse is holding steady.”
–Maxwell
“The magic pöwer hölds steady.”
–Wigfrid
“Stable, for now.”
–Webber
“Steady on.”
–Warly
“Bad! Really bad!”
–Wormwood
“It can't possibly get worse.”
–Winona
“Hyuyu! What fun!”
–Wortox
“Staying the same,.”
–Wurt
“Just a steady stream of monsters!”
–Walter
“Stay away from me!!”
–Wanda
“Feels like it's receding.”
–Wilson
“I think it's turning off.”
–Willow
“Bad light time is ending.”
–Wolfgang
“I think they're leaving.”
–Wendy
“THE CYCLE IS SUBSIDING”
–WX-78
“Levels of ectoplasmic residue are high but seem to be decreasing.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's settling down.”
–Woodie
“The pulse is waning.”
–Maxwell
“It's starting tö retreat!”
–Wigfrid
“Magic go down the hole.”
–Webber
“Subsiding.”
–Warly
“Getting better”
–Wormwood
“My head's starting to clear a bit.”
–Winona
“Aw, the chaos is dissipating.”
–Wortox
“It going away!”
–Wurt
“I think they're running out of energy...”
–Walter
“I just need to hold out a little longer--!”
–Wanda
“The nightmare is almost gone!”
–Wilson
“I guess it's nearly over.”
–Willow
“Good time is soon.”
–Wolfgang
“It's almost over.”
–Wendy
“LEVELS ARE LOW AND DIMINISHING”
–WX-78
“There is very little ectoplasmic residue vapor.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's nearly still.”
–Woodie
“It calms once more.”
–Maxwell
“Barely any magic remains.”
–Wigfrid
“Return to us, day!”
–Webber
“This nightmare is almost over!”
–Warly
“Whew”
–Wormwood
“I'm feeling much better.”
–Winona
“Playtime's almost over.”
–Wortox
“Over soon, over soon.”
–Wurt
“They're going away!”
–Walter
“It's almost over... I can do this!”
–Wanda
“There's no magic around here.”
–Wilson
“I don't think it's working.”
–Willow
“Is safe from bad light.”
–Wolfgang
“The presence has departed.”
–Wendy
“FLUCTUATIONS AT UNDETECTABLE LEVELS”
–WX-78
“There doesn't seem to be any ectoplasmic vapor around here.”
–Wickerbottom
“I think it's off.”
–Woodie
“The pulse has no influence here.”
–Maxwell
“The magic slumbers far fröm here.”
–Wigfrid
“Not much magic here.”
–Webber
“Magicless.”
–Warly
“Safe here”
–Wormwood
“Things seem pretty normal.”
–Winona
“A fun medallion for a more fun rapscallion!”
–Wortox
“Seem okay.”
–Wurt
“Aw, is it over?”
–Walter
“Looks like I'm free of any magical flapdoodle.”
–Wanda
“While in the Cave, it reveals the state of dark magic saturation.”
-
The Thulecite Medallion is an Ancient Pseudoscience Filter item. It requires 2 Nightmare Fuel, 2 Thulecite, and a Broken Pseudoscience Station to craft. Like all items from the station, the Thulecite Medallion cannot be prototyped and Characters need to be near a Broken Ancient Pseudoscience Station to craft it again.
The medallion changes colors to gauge the state of the Nightmare Cycle in the Ruins.
Calm Phase - The medallion will be tan.
Warning Phase - The medallion will be tan with red accents.
Nightmare Phase - The medallion will glow red. Nightmare Lights will spawn Shadow Creatures in this phase.
All stages of a Thulecite Medallion.
Examining the item at this time will provide further details regarding the current state of magical flux: becoming more magical, staying steady, or becoming less magical, referring to the start, middle, and end of the Nightmare Phase, respectively.
Thulecite Medallions can spawn at Cave Holes which can be gathered using The Lazy Forager.
When a Thulecite Medallion is in the inventory of a player, the Ancient Key will appear on their map, even if it is carried by another Mob or player, in a container or in an unexplored area. If the Ancient Guardian has not been killed, it will show its location, making it easier for players to locate the Ancient Guardian.

It requires 2 [[Nightmare Fuel]], 2 [[Thulecite]], and a [[Broken Pseudoscience Station]] to craft. Like all items from the station, the Thulecite Medallion cannot be prototyped and [[Characters]] need to be near a Broken Ancient Pseudoscience Station to craft it again. The medallion changes colors to gauge the state of the [[Nightmare Cycle]] in the [[Ruins]]. * '''Calm Phase''' - The medallion will be tan. * '''Warning Phase''' - The medallion will be tan with red accents. * '''Nightmare Phase''' - The medallion will glow red. [[Nightmare Light]]s will spawn [[Shadow Creatures]] in this phase. [[File:Thulecite_medallion_allstages.png|frame|center|All stages of a Thulecite Medallion.]] Examining the item at this time will provide further details regarding the current state of magical flux: ''becoming more magical'', ''staying steady'', or ''becoming less magical'', referring to the start, middle, and end of the Nightmare Phase, respectively. Thulecite Medallions can spawn at [[Cave Holes]] which can be gathered using [[The Lazy Forager]]. When a Thulecite Medallion is in the inventory of a player, the [[Ancient Key]] will appear on their map, even if it is carried by another [[Mobs|Mob]] or player, in a container or in an unexplored area. If the [[Ancient Guardian]] has not been killed, it will show its location, making it easier for players to locate the Ancient Guardian. == {{Pic32|Icon Tools}} Usage == {{Recipe |item1 = Thulecite Medallion |item2 = Papyrus |item3 = Feather Pencil |result = Bel Canto of Courage |character = Wigfrid }} {{Craftable Items}} [[Category:Craftable Items]] [[Category:Ancient Pseudoscience Filter]] [[Category:Items]] [[Category:Nightmare State Indicator]] [[Category:Non-Flammable]] __NOTOC__
